name: 政府与治理
subject: inquiry
domain_name: 社会组织 / Social Organization / Social Organization
curriculum_points: Students will be able to identify the basic functions and structures of government (e.g., local, national) and explain how they serve the needs of a community. (Age 9-11)
Students will be able to investigate and compare different forms of governance within their own and other societies, using key concepts such as function and responsibility.
